class.name: Ed25519
class.brief_description: Ed25519 digital signatures and X25519 authenticated encryption using Monocypher.
class.description: Provides Ed25519 key generation, signing, and verification, as well as X25519 authenticated public-key encryption (XChaCha20-Poly1305). All cryptographic operations are powered by the Monocypher library. Keys are 32-byte [PackedByteArray]s, signatures are 64 bytes, and encrypted output is prefixed with a 24-byte nonce and 16-byte MAC.

method.name: sign
method.description: Signs [param message] using the given Ed25519 [param private_key] (32-byte seed) and [param public_key]. Returns a 64-byte [PackedByteArray] signature, or an empty array if key sizes are invalid.

method.name: verify
method.description: Verifies an Ed25519 [param signature] against [param message] using the signer's [param public_key]. Returns [code]true[/code] if the signature is valid, [code]false[/code] otherwise or if the signature/key sizes are incorrect.

method.name: encrypt
method.description: Encrypts [param message] for the owner of [param their_public_key] using [param my_private_key]. Internally converts Ed25519 keys to X25519, performs a Diffie-Hellman key exchange, and encrypts with XChaCha20-Poly1305 (AEAD). Returns a [PackedByteArray] containing [code]nonce (24 bytes) + MAC (16 bytes) + ciphertext[/code], or an empty array on invalid key sizes.

method.name: decrypt
method.description: Decrypts [param encrypted_data] (as produced by [method encrypt]) from the owner of [param their_public_key] using [param my_private_key]. Verifies the MAC before returning the plaintext. Returns the decrypted [PackedByteArray], or an empty array if decryption/authentication fails or input sizes are invalid.
